---
title: "Mapa Perú"
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: true
editor: visual
---

```{r}
install.packages(c("sf", "ggplot2", "viridis", "dplyr", "scales","ggrepel"),
                 repos = "https://cran.r-project.org")
library(ggplot2)
library(sf)
library(scales)
library(dplyr)

peru_dep <- st_read("C:/Users/Renato/MAPA/INEI_LIMITE_DEPARTAMENTAL_GEOGPSPERU_JUANSUYO_931381206.shp")
```

```{r}
names(peru_dep)
```

```{r}

ggplot(peru_dep) +
  geom_sf(fill = "#E5E7EB", color = "white", size = 0.3) +
  ggtitle("Mapa del Perú por Departamentos") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    axis.text = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks = element_blank()
  )
```

```{r}
datos <- read.csv("C:/Users/Renato/MAPA/SINADEF_DATOS_ABIERTOS.csv")

names(datos)
```

```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(stringr)


datos <- datos %>%
  mutate(across(starts_with("CAUSA_"), ~ str_trim(.)),
         MUERTE_VIOLENTA = str_trim(MUERTE_VIOLENTA))


suicidios <- datos %>%
  filter(
    
    grepl("^X6|^X7|^X8[0-4]", CAUSA_A_CIEX) |
    grepl("^X6|^X7|^X8[0-4]", CAUSA_B_CIEX) |
    grepl("^X6|^X7|^X8[0-4]", CAUSA_C_CIEX) |
    grepl("^X6|^X7|^X8[0-4]", CAUSA_D_CIEX) |
    grepl("^X6|^X7|^X8[0-4]", CAUSA_E_CIEX) |
    grepl("^X6|^X7|^X8[0-4]", CAUSA_F_CIEX) |
   
    MUERTE_VIOLENTA == "SUICIDIO"
  )


table(suicidios$ANIO)

```

```{r}
DF <- suicidios %>%
  group_by(DEPARTAMENTO_FALLECIMIENTO) %>%
  summarise(total = n(), .groups = "drop")
```

```{r}

DF <- suicidios %>%
  group_by(DEPARTAMENTO_FALLECIMIENTO) %>%
  summarise(total = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  mutate(DEPARTAMENTO_FALLECIMIENTO = toupper(trimws(DEPARTAMENTO_FALLECIMIENTO)))


DF$DEPARTAMENTO_FALLECIMIENTO[DF$DEPARTAMENTO_FALLECIMIENTO == "LIMA METROPOLITANA"] <- "LIMA"


DF <- merge(
  data.frame(NOMBDEP = toupper(trimws(peru_dep$NOMBDEP))), 
  DF, 
  by.x = "NOMBDEP", 
  by.y = "DEPARTAMENTO_FALLECIMIENTO", 
  all.x = TRUE
)


DF$total[is.na(DF$total)] <- 0

mapa_final <- merge(peru_dep, DF, by = "NOMBDEP", all.x = TRUE)

mapa_final$total[is.na(mapa_final$total)] <- 0
```

```{r}
write.csv(DF,
          "C:/Users/Renato/MAPA/suicidios_por_departamento.csv",
          row.names = FALSE)
```

```{r}
DF <- suicidios %>%
  group_by(DEPARTAMENTO_FALLECIMIENTO) %>%
  summarise(total = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
  mutate(
    DEPARTAMENTO_FALLECIMIENTO = toupper(trimws(DEPARTAMENTO_FALLECIMIENTO)),
    DEPARTAMENTO_FALLECIMIENTO = ifelse(
      DEPARTAMENTO_FALLECIMIENTO == "LIMA METROPOLITANA", "LIMA", DEPARTAMENTO_FALLECIMIENTO
    )
  )

DF <- merge(
  data.frame(DEPARTAMENTO_FALLECIMIENTO = toupper(trimws(peru_dep$NOMBDEP))),
  DF, by = "DEPARTAMENTO_FALLECIMIENTO", all.x = TRUE
)
DF$total[is.na(DF$total)] <- 0

mapa_raw <- merge(
  peru_dep, DF,
  by.x  = "NOMBDEP",
  by.y  = "DEPARTAMENTO_FALLECIMIENTO",
  all.x = TRUE
)
mapa_raw$total[is.na(mapa_raw$total)] <- 0

mapa_proj <- st_transform(mapa_raw, crs = 32718)

bb   <- st_bbox(mapa_proj)
padx <- (bb["xmax"] - bb["xmin"]) * 0.03
pady <- (bb["ymax"] - bb["ymin"]) * 0.03

mx <- max(mapa_proj$total, na.rm = TRUE)

breaks_v <- c(0, 
              round(mx * 0.10), 
              round(mx * 0.30), 
              round(mx * 0.60), 
              mx)

p <- ggplot(mapa_proj) +
  geom_sf(
    aes(fill = total),
    color     = "white",
    linewidth = 0.3
  ) +
  scale_fill_gradientn(
    colours = c("#FFF7EC", "#FEE8C8", "#FDD49E", 
                "#FC8D59", "#E34A33", "#B30000"),
    trans   = "sqrt", 
    name    = "Casos\nregistrados",
    limits  = c(0, mx),
    breaks  = breaks_v,
    labels  = comma,
    guide   = guide_colorbar(
      barwidth        = 0.8,
      barheight       = 8,
      title.position  = "top",
      title.hjust      = 0.5,
      ticks.colour    = "#666666",
      ticks.linewidth = 0.4,
      frame.colour    = "#DDDDDD",
      frame.linewidth = 0.4
    )
  ) +
  coord_sf(
    xlim   = c(bb["xmin"] - padx, bb["xmax"] + padx),
    ylim   = c(bb["ymin"] - pady, bb["ymax"] + pady),
    expand = FALSE
  ) +
  labs(
    title    = "Mortalidad por suicidio en el Perú",
    subtitle = paste0("Casos acumulados por departamento (2017 - 2026)\n", 
                      "Filtro: Códigos CIE-10 y Variable 'Muerte Violenta'"),
    caption  = "Fuente: SINADEF – MINSA | Elaboración propia"
  ) +
  theme_void(base_family = "sans") +
  theme(
    plot.background  = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
    plot.title = element_text(
      size   = 16, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5, 
      color  = "#111111", margin = margin(t = 14, b = 3)
    ),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(
      size   = 9, hjust = 0.5, 
      color  = "#555555", margin = margin(b = 8)
    ),
    plot.caption = element_text(
      size   = 7, hjust = 0.5, 
      color  = "#999999", margin = margin(t = 8, b = 10)
    ),
    legend.position      = "right",
    legend.justification = "center",
    legend.title  = element_text(color = "#222222", size = 8, 
                                 face = "bold", lineheight = 1.4),
    legend.text   = element_text(color = "#444444", size = 7.5),
    plot.margin = margin(10, 8, 8, 8)
  )

ggsave(
  "mapa_suicidios_peru_final.png",
  plot   = p,
  width  = 6,
  height = 9,
  dpi    = 300,
  bg     = "white"
)
print(p)
```
